title: CELINE MappingSpec
description: Schema for CELINE declarative mapping spec YAML files.

target_type.description: RDF class CURIE or full IRI (e.g. 'peco:Renewable_energy_community')

id_template.description: Jinja2 template for @id. Variables: row fields + context dict.

label_template.description: Optional Jinja2 template for rdfs:label shorthand.

context_vars.description: Names of variables injected from the caller context (not from the row).

source.description: Key in the input row dict. Omit for kind=constant.

target.description: Ontology property CURIE or full IRI.

datatype.description: XSD datatype CURIE (e.g. xsd:string, xsd:decimal). Used for kind=literal.

required.description: Raise MappingError if source field is absent or null.

iri_template.description: Jinja2 template for kind=iri. {value} is the source field value.

nested_type.description: RDF class CURIE for the nested sub-node. Required for kind=nested.

nested_fields.description: Field mappings applied to each item in the nested list/object.
